name: tuxedomd
description: A sleek, local-first Markdown editor for Windows, macOS, and Linux.
author: BurntToasters <code@rosie.run>

scripts.tauri:dev: npm run sync-version && cross-env TUXEDO_EDITION=community VITE_TUXEDO_EDITION=community tauri dev
scripts.tauri:dev:pro: npm run sync-version && cross-env TUXEDO_EDITION=full VITE_TUXEDO_EDITION=full tauri dev
scripts.tauri:build: npm run sync-version && npm run licenses && cross-env TUXEDO_EDITION=community VITE_TUXEDO_EDITION=community node scripts/tauri-build.js --require-tauri-signing
scripts.licenses: npm run licenses:npm && npm run licenses:cargo
scripts.b: git fetch origin && git reset --hard && git clean -fd && git switch -C beta origin/beta && git reset --hard origin/beta && git clean -fd && npm run vi
scripts.r: git fetch origin && git reset --hard && git clean -fd && git switch -C main origin/main && git reset --hard origin/main && git clean -fd && npm run vi && npm run gitprune:force
scripts.u: npm update && cd ./src-tauri && cargo update && cd .. && npm run release:prepare && npm run format && npm run test:all
scripts.win-compiler:arm64: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -NoExit -Command "& 'C:\\Program Files\\Microsoft Visual Studio\\18\\Community\\Common7\\Tools\\Launch-VsDevShell.ps1' -SkipAutomaticLocation -Arch arm64 -HostArch amd64"
scripts.rust:target:win: npm run rust:target:win:x64 && npm run rust:target:win:arm64
scripts.rust:target:mac: npm run rust:target:mac:x64 && npm run rust:target:mac:arm64
scripts.build:win:x64: npm run rust:target:win:x64 && npm run sync-version && npm run licenses && cross-env TUXEDO_EDITION=community VITE_TUXEDO_EDITION=community dotenv -e .env -- node scripts/tauri-build.js --require-tauri-signing --require-windows-signing --target x86_64-pc-windows-msvc --bundles nsis,msi
scripts.build:win:arm64: npm run rust:target:win:arm64 && npm run sync-version && npm run licenses && cross-env TUXEDO_EDITION=community VITE_TUXEDO_EDITION=community dotenv -e .env -- node scripts/tauri-build.js --require-tauri-signing --require-windows-signing --target aarch64-pc-windows-msvc --bundles nsis,msi
scripts.build:win: npm run build:win:x64 && npm run build:win:arm64
scripts.build:msstore:win:x64: npm run rust:target:win:x64 && npm run sync-version && npm run licenses && cross-env TUXEDO_EDITION=full VITE_TUXEDO_EDITION=full dotenv -e .env -- node scripts/tauri-build.js --require-tauri-signing --target x86_64-pc-windows-msvc --no-bundle --config src-tauri/tauri.msstore.conf.json
scripts.build:msstore:win:arm64: npm run rust:target:win:arm64 && npm run sync-version && npm run licenses && cross-env TUXEDO_EDITION=full VITE_TUXEDO_EDITION=full dotenv -e .env -- node scripts/tauri-build.js --require-tauri-signing --target aarch64-pc-windows-msvc --no-bundle --config src-tauri/tauri.msstore.conf.json
scripts.build:msstore: npm run build:msstore:win && dotenv -e .env -- node scripts/msstore-pack.js
scripts.build:msstore:win: npm run build:msstore:win:x64 && npm run build:msstore:win:arm64
scripts.build:msstore:x64: npm run build:msstore:win:x64 && dotenv -e .env -- node scripts/msstore-pack.js x64
scripts.build:msstore:legacy-msix: npm run sync-version && npm run licenses && cross-env TUXEDO_EDITION=full VITE_TUXEDO_EDITION=full dotenv -e .env -- node scripts/tauri-build.js --target x86_64-pc-windows-msvc --no-bundle --config src-tauri/tauri.msstore.conf.json && dotenv -e .env -- node scripts/msstore-pack.js x64
scripts.build:mac:universal: npm run rust:target:mac && npm run sync-version && npm run licenses && npm run icons:normalize && cross-env TUXEDO_EDITION=community VITE_TUXEDO_EDITION=community dotenv -e .env -- node scripts/tauri-build.js --require-tauri-signing --require-macos-signing --require-macos-notarization --target universal-apple-darwin --bundles dmg,app
scripts.build:mac:appstore: npm run rust:target:mac && npm run sync-version && npm run licenses && npm run icons:normalize && cross-env TUXEDO_EDITION=full VITE_TUXEDO_EDITION=full dotenv -e .env -- node scripts/tauri-build.js --require-macos-signing --target universal-apple-darwin --bundles app --config src-tauri/tauri.appstore.conf.json
scripts.build:linux:x64: npm run rust:target:linux:x64 && npm run sync-version && npm run licenses && cross-env TUXEDO_EDITION=full VITE_TUXEDO_EDITION=full dotenv -e .env -- node scripts/tauri-build.js --require-tauri-signing --target x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu --bundles appimage,deb,rpm
scripts.release:prepare: npm run rust:update && npm ci && npm run sync-version && cargo check --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml -q && npm run dist:clean-release-artifacts && npm run test:all
scripts.release:win: npm run release:warn && npm run release:prepare && npm run release:draft && npm run build:win && npm run build:msstore && npm run release:sign:gpg && npm run release:finalize
scripts.release:mac: npm run release:warn && npm run release:prepare && npm run release:wait-draft && npm run build:mac:universal && npm run build:mac:zip && npm run build:mac:appstore && npm run build:mac:pkg && npm run release:sign:gpg && npm run release:finalize
scripts.release:mac:ssh: npm run mac:ssh:keychain && npm run release:mac
scripts.release:linux: npm run release:warn && npm run release:prepare && npm run release:wait-draft && npm run build:linux:x64 && npm run release:sign:gpg && npm run release:finalize
scripts.setup:deb: sudo apt update && sudo apt install -y build-essential curl wget file libgtk-3-dev libwebkit2gtk-4.1-dev libjavascriptcoregtk-4.1-dev libsoup-3.0-dev libglib2.0-dev libssl-dev libayatana-appindicator3-dev librsvg2-dev patchelf rpm && rustup toolchain install stable --profile minimal && rustup default stable
